reviews.author: Catherine
reviews.text: I didn’t visit the island itself because all the reviews seemed so confusing and different in price, just had coffee in the nearby cafe and it was more than enough for me. If you are short in time you can simply enjoy the views from the far.

reviews.author: Nathan Ng
reviews.text: I had an amazing time at Mũi Kê Gà! The water was crystal clear, the sand was soft and clean, and the entire area felt safe and peaceful. Whether you’re looking to relax under the sun, take a refreshing swim, or go for a walk along the shoreline, this beach has it all. There were plenty of spots to set up a towel or umbrella, and the vibe was peaceful — not too crowded, even during peak hours. I also appreciated how clean the facilities were, and there were some great food vendors nearby offering everything from fresh seafood to cold drinks. Sunset here is absolutely stunning — definitely worth staying for. I’d highly recommend this beach to anyone looking for a relaxing getaway or a fun day trip with friends and family. Can’t wait to come back!

reviews.author: Han Nguyen
reviews.text: This spectacular lighthouse was built in the 19th century, French era. Many years ago, visitors still allowed to ascend the lighthouse, but I heard its nt allowed now. Seem like not many visitors, the beaches around this area were quiet and peaceful.

reviews.author: Thao Nhu
reviews.text: Unique spot near Mui Ne to visit . You can rent a roller to go there and rent a boat to go to the lighthouse , it’s very cheap , we pay about 10€ for 3 people . The island have only few visitors , so if you are lucky , you would be the only one there . So far away from the tourist spot .

reviews.author: MICHAEL WONG
reviews.text: First time at Ke Ga lighthouse this past weekend + I was blown away by the white powered sand, sky blue clear water + gorgeous bay dotted with fishing boats. Best beach I have seen so far in this great country ❤️🇻🇳❤️ it’s only 4 hours away from HCMC. Will definitely go back. I wonder if I can camp on the beach 🏖 🤔

reviews.author: I. S.
reviews.text: This place is simply amazing. No... No... No... You are gonna have some breathtaking moment near the KeGa lighthouse. It is located on the island which is 5 minutes away from the coast by boat. The island is beautiful itself. For me it was like I am the character of "The Lord of the Rings" movie. Great! 5 star in my opinion.

reviews.author: Ho Ngoc Tin
reviews.text: Really nice place of Phan Thiet city. Because it's far from city center, not so many people visit here. The boat will take you to the lighthouse, because the safety reason, you can't climb up to the top anymore. The beach is beautiful and not crowded like Mui Ne.

reviews.author: Khine Sandar Tun
reviews.text: Such an Instagrammable place. Worth visiting!

reviews.author: Heinz Kronpass
reviews.text: Beautiful place with a lot of dragon fruit plantations. Here you can find a lot of beautiful beaches without any other tourists in sight . But still not so easy to go there as it is not a popular tourist destination. Perfect if you search for a lonely clean beach for away from mass tourism . If you are in Phan Thiet you can take a bus or taxi to go there . I Highly recommend this place if you like it quite.

reviews.author: Ieva Prūsė
reviews.text: Magical place, no people there. You can take a boat for 400k, and walk there as much as you want. Seems like it is made with insta filter but it is reallity :)

reviews.author: Nuria Figuerola
reviews.text: The light house is alright. The views are really gorgeous, though. I found the boat a bit expensive (about 17 dollars return for 2 people) the journey takes like 4 minutes on a run down, noisy boat. I would also advise you not to eat in the restaurant around the light house. They are very pricey for tourists and the food is not very good.

reviews.author: DominiQC Asean
reviews.text: The lighthouse is located on the island but can be viewed from the shore. It still works and can be accessed during the day until 5pm. There numerous restaurants near the main dock where you can enjoy a fabulous. sunset and look at fisherman boats moored in the bay. Therefore I recommend going late in the afternoon.

reviews.author: Nina Zink
reviews.text: Such a beautiful place, you have to pay 100.000 dong each for the boat and extra 10.000 dong to get to the lighthouse what is a bit weird but its a smal amount of money to see this beautiful place!

reviews.author: Vu
reviews.text: Beautiful island with a historic lighthouse built by the French in 1899. Back in 2013 I was able to go to the top of the lighthouse, but it is now closed due to safety reasons.

reviews.author: Manolo
reviews.text: You need to pay 50.000 if u want to go there by boat and 20.000 for the entrance. It does not worth, you CANNOT go on the top of the lighthouse as it is closed for safety reason. There are better places to go

reviews.author: Tony Hà
reviews.text: So Peaceful!! So fresh air!!! This place is suitable for camping that can be enjoy from the best of the sunset view

reviews.author: Serge Brazen
reviews.text: Views is beautiful and that’s pretty much it. Boat guy try to ask for big money but finally get 200 000 for two people. All the way to the Lighthouse you can enjoy dirty beach full of fisherman’s waste and dead fish. Once you arrive to this little island with Lighthouse you will meet lazy dude who ask you for 10k for a person just because he can. Of course no tickets back. It’s takes more then hour from Muy Ne. A bit waste of time but if nothing else to do... welcome. Btw Lighthouse is closed to climb, you can’t go inside and take photos from above.

reviews.author: Sonal Modakwar
reviews.text: Nice scenic place near Lagi.. 20K is entry fees and 30k-40k for boat.. Good for campaigning on beach..

reviews.author: Lee Bona
reviews.text: Beautiful scenery but tourists are not mindful and litter a lot

reviews.author: Mai Phạm
reviews.text: Just a small place to explore but it's beautiful though. Just one hour here is enough 😊

reviews.author: Huy Do Duc
reviews.text: Good place to check in with sun set or sun rise. Taking the boat to lighthouse to get better view.

reviews.author: Thông Trịnh
reviews.text: Beautiful island, not far from the beach. Enjoy the sun rising earliest in Vietnam

reviews.author: Phan Thùy Dương
reviews.text: From the top of the lighthouse built on the island, you can enjoy a fabulous view of the open sea

reviews.author: Kỳ Kỳ
reviews.text: You have to rent a boat to go to the island, the sea is very beautiful, the scenery is great .

reviews.author: Patrick
reviews.text: Great place for nature lovers and photographers. Very nice scenery. A bit of climbing required to access the stone beach. Due to the near fishing harbour, it’s not perfectly clean everywhere.

reviews.author: Ngoc Anh Nguyen
reviews.text: Great place for Camping. Enjoying sunrise and sunset with the sound of sea.

reviews.author: Trang Nguyen
reviews.text: Nice rocks, 50k/ticket for cano

reviews.author: de tran
reviews.text: Perhaps this is the most scenic and historic sight worth your visit around this area

reviews.author: Nguyen Duc Minh
reviews.text: It was a pity that we could not climb up the lighthouse. Just strolled around this islet and enjoyed the sunset. Although Ke Ga Lighthouse is not far from the shore, you still need to rent a boat to get there. The fishermen charged VND50k per person for a round trip, which took us about 5 minutes. Guess it’s something to kill time but not something I would highly recommend going
